commit.message: With -UseLSE the Starvation test on Windows timeouts close to 100% whereas this only happens on Linux on larger machines with many cores.  The issue is that the LDR following the CAS can execute before the STLXR breaking the Dekker protocol, replacing with LADR by using getAcquire the solves the issue as it won't be reordered before the STLXR.
